meaning: adj.澧欏涓婄殑n.澹佺敾,澹侀グ
examples: This subscriptive mural is designed partly to raise money.
It's one of more than 3, 600 pieces of art created by the city's Mural Arts Program.
There are students in Grand Rapids, Michigan, who designed a mural to brighten a struggling neighborhood.
Which is, one has to admit, more moving than anything usually seen in a WPA mural.
